_comment: Hand-curated intern / new-grad programs for tech entities that have a `jobPortal` set in the database. Used by skills/job_crawl/seed_intern_entry_jobs.ts to produce category='job' events narrowed by the active settings file's jobsConfig.skillsKeywords. Each program carries a `relevantSkills` tag array drawn from the skillsKeywords vocabulary (Python, Java, C++, JavaScript, ...). URLs are the entity's canonical careers/university page with a program-specific query param or path where known; dedup is by article URL so the query param keeps different programs on the same host unique.

programs.title: Google STEP Intern (Student Training in Engineering Program)
programs.description: Google's early-career internship for 1st/2nd-year students, focused on foundational software engineering in C++, Java, Python, and JavaScript.

programs.title: Google University Graduate Software Engineer (New-Grad)
programs.description: New-grad SWE role across Google's AI, Cloud, and core product teams. Strong DS&A fundamentals required.

programs.title: Microsoft Software Engineer Intern
programs.description: Summer internship across Azure, Windows, Office, and AI divisions. Focus on production systems.

programs.title: Microsoft Aspire Program (New-Grad Rotational)
programs.description: Two-year rotational program for new grads joining Microsoft's engineering org. Includes AI-for-Good and Azure rotations.

programs.title: Apple Software Engineering Internship
programs.description: Summer internship across Core OS, Services, and Hardware Engineering. Strong C++/Swift and Unix fundamentals expected.

programs.title: Meta University Software Engineer Intern
programs.description: Nine-week summer internship for rising juniors, focused on full-stack and mobile development.

programs.title: Meta University Graduate Software Engineer
programs.description: New-grad SWE role across Family of Apps and Reality Labs. DSA + one of Python/C++/JS strongly expected.

programs.title: Amazon SDE Intern (Software Development Engineer)
programs.description: Summer SDE internship across AWS, Alexa, Prime Video, and Retail. DS&A-heavy interview loop.

programs.title: Amazon SDE New-Grad (Propel rotational path)
programs.description: Full-time SDE role for recent grads, with Propel rotational option across AWS and Retail.

programs.title: AWS SDE Intern (Cloud Infrastructure)
programs.description: AWS-specific SDE internship on services like EC2, S3, Lambda, Bedrock, and SageMaker.

programs.title: Nvidia Deep Learning Research Intern
programs.description: Research internship on generative models, robotics, and CUDA kernel optimization inside Nvidia Research.

programs.title: Nvidia New-Grad Software Engineer (CUDA & Systems)
programs.description: New-grad systems SWE role working on CUDA runtime, cuDNN, and TensorRT.

programs.title: Intel Undergraduate Software Engineering Intern
programs.description: Undergraduate SWE internship across Intel's data center and AI software stack (oneAPI, OpenVINO).

programs.title: AMD Software Engineering Intern (ROCm & AI Stack)
programs.description: Summer internship on ROCm, MIOpen, and AI compiler work targeting MI300/MI325 GPUs.

programs.title: Oracle Graduate Software Engineer
programs.description: New-grad SWE role in Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI), database engineering, or SaaS apps.

programs.title: IBM Accelerate: Software Engineering Intern
programs.description: IBM Accelerate learning-and-build intern track on watsonx, OpenShift, and Red Hat stack.

programs.title: Adobe Software Engineering Intern
programs.description: Summer SWE internship across Creative Cloud, Document Cloud, and Adobe Research (Firefly).

programs.title: Adobe Research Scientist Intern (Firefly / Multimodal)
programs.description: Adobe Research internship on diffusion models, multimodal generation, and video synthesis.

programs.title: Salesforce Futureforce Intern (Software Engineering)
programs.description: Futureforce University internship across the Salesforce platform, Data Cloud, and Einstein AI.

programs.title: Uber University Engineering Intern
programs.description: Summer engineering internship across Rides, Eats, and Autonomous Mobility. Strong backend systems focus.

programs.title: Figma Early-Career Software Engineer (New-Grad)
programs.description: New-grad SWE role at Figma spanning multiplayer infra, web rendering, and the Figma AI team.

programs.title: TikTok Software Engineer Intern (Recommendation & ML Infra)
programs.description: Summer internship at TikTok on recommendation systems, ML infra, and content-understanding models.

programs.title: ByteDance University New-Grad SWE
programs.description: ByteDance new-grad SWE role across TikTok, CapCut, Lark, and Doubao LLM infrastructure.

programs.title: Palantir PATH Internship (Forward Deployed Software Engineer)
programs.description: Palantir's PATH internship for Forward Deployed and Product Development Engineers working on Foundry and AIP.

programs.title: CrowdStrike University Software Engineer Intern
programs.description: University internship on Falcon endpoint agents, detection infrastructure, and cloud security.

programs.title: Anthropic Research Engineer Intern
programs.description: Anthropic research engineering internship on alignment, interpretability, and Claude training infrastructure.

programs.title: OpenAI Research Engineer Residency
programs.description: Six-month residency for early-career researchers to transition into full-time research engineer roles at OpenAI.

programs.title: JPMorgan Chase Software Engineer Intern Program
programs.description: Summer SWE internship across CIB, Consumer Bank, and AI Research — infrastructure, trading platforms, and LLM apps.

programs.title: TSMC IC Design / EDA Software Intern
programs.description: TSMC internship on EDA tooling, design automation, and lithography modeling software.
